phases.goal: Always detect buildings correctly, detect companies correctly, and use Google Maps / mapping data well. Fix the silent loss of multipolygon C&I rooftops, add conflated coverage (Overture/Microsoft via DuckDB in Rust), classify building type, dedup across sources, reorder the company pipeline so address anchors every lookup, and make geocoding/Google Maps integration first-class.

improvements.title: Fetch relation (multipolygon) buildings, not just ways — switch Overpass query from way[building] to nwr/way+relation
Add relationToPolygon() to assemble outer rings from members[role=outer]
Assemble inner rings (role=inner) as polygon holes and subtract from area
Extend OverpassElement type with members[]{role,geometry} for relations
Use turf.multiPolygon for relations with multiple disjoint outer rings
Set source/id for relation buildings (osm_rel_<id>) and persist osmType
Stop dropping <200m² buildings unconditionally; make min-area a config constant
Raise per-request Overpass timeout and maxsize ([timeout:90][maxsize] tuned)
Tile large bboxes into ~0.04deg grid cells (tileBBox helper)
Fetch tiles with bounded concurrency (2-3) via Promise.allSettled
Per-tile retry/backoff across the existing mirror list
Report partial-tile failures to the user (X of Y tiles loaded)
Cache fetched tiles by tile id in DB to make re-scans cheap
Add geometric dedup across overlapping tiles (centroid grid bucket + distance/area test)
Prefer OSM over ML footprints on dedup ties (richer tags win)
Replace store id-only Set dedup with geometry-aware merge in addBuildings
Add Rust #[tauri::command] fetch_overture_buildings(bbox) using DuckDB
Add duckdb crate (bundled, httpfs, json, parquet, spatial) to Cargo.toml
Load httpfs+spatial once at startup; SET s3_region us-west-2 (anonymous)
Bbox-filtered Overture SQL returning ST_AsGeoJSON geometry + class/subtype/height
Filter Overture to C&I subtype/class (commercial/industrial/warehouse/retail/office)
TS wrapper fetchOvertureBuildings() invoking the Rust command, mapping to BuildingFeature
Merge Overture results with OSM via the shared dedup (OSM wins)
Add 'overture' to BuildingFeature.source union and DB CHECK constraint
Add migration v4 adding 'preset' and 'overture' to buildings source CHECK
Carry Overture height/num_floors into rawTags for multi-storey heuristics
Add a 'Coverage source' toggle (OSM only / OSM+Overture) in layers panel
Build classifyUse() mapping building= tag to BuildingUse enum + ciScore
Map warehouse/industrial/factory/hangar to logistics/metalwork
Map retail/supermarket/commercial/shop and office/office= to retail/office
Fetch landuse=industrial/commercial/retail polygons in the same Overpass call
Boost ciScore for building=yes whose centroid is inside industrial landuse
Use man_made=works, industrial=*, shop=*, office=*, amenity=* as classifier boosters
Persist ciScore/ciConfidence on the building and surface in UI sort/filter
Auto-populate Lead.buildingUse from classifyUse on first auto-fill
Add 'High-confidence C&I only' filter toggle
Reorder company pipeline: reverseGeocode FIRST in handleGetMetadata
Feed the resolved Nominatim address into findNearbyBusinesses + Gemini
Seed company candidate from geo.name when lead has no company
Persist resolved address onto the lead record from Get Metadata
Extract Nominatim top-level name/class/type (currently discarded) as company signal
Add ReverseGeocodeResult.name/category fields and surface in UI
Pass building footprint geometry to findNearbyBusinesses for point-in-polygon priority
Prefer POIs inside the building polygon over nearest-by-distance
Widen POI query to include node+way+relation and shop/office/craft/industrial keys
Score nearby businesses (in-polygon > C&I tag > distance) before slicing top 5
AbortController on company lookups to cancel previous requests on building change
Track request id so a stale response cannot clobber the current building's state
Pass building name/area/use into the Gemini company prompt for grounding
Add NIF format to Gemini prompt instruction (9 digits) and validate parsed NIF
Validate Gemini JSON shape with a CompanyInfo zod schema before accepting
Surface Gemini confidence + source in the suggestion chip subtitle
Cache reverse-geocode results by rounded lat/lon to respect Nominatim 1 req/s
Add a global Nominatim request queue (1 req/sec) shared by search + reverse
Send User-Agent header on reverse geocode (currently only search sends it)
Distinguish 'no results' vs 'network error' in MapSearch and show message
Add forward-geocode company-name search (search businesses, not just places)
Show place class/type chips in MapSearch dropdown results
Keyboard arrow navigation + highlight in MapSearch results dropdown
Add a 'Place a building pin here' action when geocode lands on empty area
Improve usableFraction(): vary by building class/size instead of flat 0.65
Warehouse/industrial/agriculture >1000m² -> 0.78 usable fraction
Retail/office -> 0.62; small/irregular -> 0.5-0.55 usable fraction
Apply negative turf.buffer(~1.5m) setback before computing usable roof area
Flag multi-storey buildings (height/num_floors) as likely pitched/shaded
Pass building use into estimatePeakPower call sites
Centralize kWp/area heuristic constants (0.18 W/m², 1480 kWh/kWp) in one config
Pass actual estimated kWp (not raw area heuristic) into PVGIS recalc consistently
Distinct crisp building-outline line layer above fill (line-width 2, high contrast)
Render MultiPolygon + holes correctly in the MapLibre buildings source
Never run turf.simplify on display geometry — keep all OSM vertices
Tag ML-only footprints needsOutlineCheck and badge them 'verify outline'
Add manual polygon-edit/nudge mode to snap footprints to satellite imagery
Persist user-edited geometry back to DB (source becomes 'manual')
Add Google Maps place-link deep link using company name + coords
Fix googleNearbySearchUrl to URL-encode query and use a stable maps search URL
Add Google Maps directions link (from saved office to building)
Validate streetViewUrl coords and clamp lat/lon to valid ranges
Use MapTiler satellite style by default when key present (avoid OSM->switch flash)
Add DGT ortophoto WMS layer toggle (config.dgtWmsUrl is already defined, unused)
Add satellite/streets toggle state persistence in localStorage
Show building-count + classification legend overlay on the map
Detect existing PV more robustly (fix && precedence bug in hasSolarOnOSM)
Add roof:material/solar tags and module count to hasSolarOnOSM detection
Detect PV from Overture/landuse and set solarStatus partial vs has_panels
pickNIF: also read ref:vatin on nearby POI nodes, not just the building
pickCompany: include amenity/shop/craft brand fallbacks from nearby POIs
Merge nearby-POI fields (phone/website/email) into lead during auto-fill
Add address-driven Portuguese NIF/registry lookup stub (companyLookup pipeline step)
Normalize phone numbers to +351 E.164 on save
Compute and store centroid accurately for multipolygon (turf.centroid on full geometry)
Store osmType (way/relation) so OSM deep-links use /way/ or /relation/
Fix hardcoded /way/ OSM links to respect osmType
Add building name fallback from nearby POI when OSM name absent
Increase POI search radius adaptively for large warehouses (radius ~ sqrt(area))
Persist nearby-business raw results so re-opening a lead reuses them (cache)
Add zoom-based 'Get Rooftops' guidance so detection runs at the right scale
Show per-building source badge (OSM/Overture/manual) in LocationSummary
Add unit tests for relationToPolygon, dedupeBuildings, classifyUse, usableFraction
Add fixtures of real PT multipolygon warehouses for regression detection tests

phases.goal: Eliminate silent failures and data loss. Replace empty catch blocks with logging + user-facing error toasts, add input validation and schema parsing at every boundary, wrap multi-statement DB writes in transactions, fix race conditions and stale closures, harden the schema, and make the app degrade gracefully offline.

improvements.title: Add a global errorMessage state + setErrorMessage to the store
Render an error toast (red, dismissible) mirroring the success toast in App
Replace silent catch in LocationSummary.saveField with error toast
Replace silent catch in LocationSummary.handleCalcSolar save with error toast
Replace silent catch in LocationDetails.handleField/handleCalcSolar with toast
Surface duplicateLead failure (LocationDetails) as an error toast not console.warn
Replace silent catch in DropLocationDialog.handleDrop save with error toast
Replace silent catch in NotesAndTasks.handleDeleteNote with error toast
Replace silent catch in Sidebar.handleExportExcel with error toast
Replace silent catch in TableView.handleExport (CSV) with error toast
Surface App initial-load DB failures (getAllBuildings/Leads/Notes) with a banner
Distinguish 'browser dev (no Tauri)' from real DB errors before swallowing
Add isTauri() guard helper instead of relying on catch-to-detect
Show error UI when fetchPVGIS hard-fails (not just silent regional fallback)
Badge PVGIS result source (real vs regional-estimate) in the solar panel UI
Replace pvgis.ts console.warn fallback with a structured logger call
Replace gemini.ts console.warn with structured logger
Create a small logger module (dev console, no-op in prod, ring buffer)
Show Gemini timeout (12s) message instead of indefinite spinner
Add a React error boundary around the main view tree
Route all network calls through timedFetch (overpass.ts still uses raw fetch)
Route companyLookup.ts and gemini.ts through timedFetch with retries
Route pvgis.ts through timedFetch for consistent timeout/retry
Parse Overpass error type (timeout vs no-data vs network) for specific messages
Replace vague 'Erro Overpass' with parsed contextual message
Add Zod schema DBLeadSchema and parse rows in rowToLead before casting
Add Zod schema DBBuildingSchema and parse in rowToBuilding
Validate monthly_kwh JSON is exactly 12 numbers before use
Add isValidNIF() Portuguese checksum validator (not just /^\d{9}$/)
Inline NIF validation error in LocationDetails Individual tab
Inline NIF validation error in LocationSummary edit path
Add isValidEmail() validator and apply on email field save
Add normalizeUrl()/isValidUrl() and warn on non-http website values
Trim + reject empty company name before save
Cap keyword filter to 100 chars and sanitize
Add min=0 and sane max to area/kWp number inputs in SearchFilter
Reject negative/NaN area & kWp in filter state setters
Add maxLength to company/owner/tags/website/notes inputs
Enforce length limits in DB layer (truncate/validate before insert)
Validate lat/lon finite before any DB save / map ease
Wrap saveBuildingsBatch chunks in a single SQL transaction
Use multi-row INSERT (not per-row loop) inside each chunk
Wrap multi-field suggestion apply (company+website+phone+nif) in one save not 5
Fix saveLead to preserve original created_at on REPLACE (avoid reset)
Use INSERT ... ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE instead of INSERT OR REPLACE (avoid FK cascade delete of notes)
Verify notes survive a lead save (regression: REPLACE deletes child rows via cascade)
Persist 'preset' source value end-to-end now that CHECK allows it
Add NOT NULL / default discipline review to leads critical columns (documented)
Add composite index idx_leads_building_pipeline(building_id, pipeline_stage)
Add migration registration for v5 in lib.rs
Persist building classification fields (ci_score, building_use_auto) columns
Fix race: auto-fill effect overwriting user edits when building changes mid-edit
Only auto-fill when lead absent or field empty; guard against in-flight edits
Cancel/ignore stale findNearbyBusinesses response after building switch
Verify MapView handleMapClick/handleDblClick deps include latest building data
Guard map operations after unmount in async dblclick handler
Wrap localStorage.setItem map-view persist in try-catch (quota)
Abort in-flight Overpass fetch on MapView unmount (AbortController)
Add explicit 8s timeout + AbortController to Mapillary requests
Show 'Street view unavailable' on Mapillary timeout instead of blank
Guard StreetViewModal against building change during fetch (stale embed)
Confirm dialog before deleting a note (currently permanent, no warning)
Soft-delete notes (deleted_at) with brief undo window
Confirm dialog before dropping a location (sets pipeline=lost)
Success toast after duplicateLead completes
Disable network actions (Get Rooftops/PVGIS/Gemini) when offline, not just banner
Queue lead saves while offline and flush on reconnect
Show offline-friendly empty/explanatory state in MapSearch
Cache last Overpass area in DB so map shows buildings offline
Handle CSV/Excel export when buildings empty (don't produce empty file silently)
Properly CSV-escape embedded quotes/newlines/commas in exportLeadsCSV
Add BOM to CSV so Excel opens UTF-8 PT characters correctly
Handle Get Rooftops zero-area / degenerate bbox
Handle draw polygon with <3 points / self-intersecting ring gracefully
Guard turf.area on invalid geometry (NaN/zero) before storing
Handle missing boundingbox in Nominatim result (already partially) + clamp
Guard division by zero in solar density (area=0)
Guard SolarChart against empty/NaN monthly arrays
Handle Gemini returning malformed/truncated JSON without throwing
Validate building exists before opening Summary/Details/Drop (selectedBuildingId stale)
Close LocationSummary/Details when its building is removed from store
Prevent duplicate notes insertion on double-click submit
Debounce/disable Calculate Solar while a calc is in flight (double-trigger)
Guard against concurrent Get Rooftops invocations (disable while loading already; add lock)
Validate imported geometry source value against allowed set before DB save
Add lead_audit_trail table to log field-level changes
Write audit rows on saveLead (field, old, new, timestamp)
Expose recent changes list in LocationDetails (read audit trail)
Add DB integrity self-check on startup (PRAGMA integrity_check) with warning
Add WAL mode + busy_timeout pragmas to avoid 'database is locked'
Serialize concurrent writes through a single async DB mutex/queue
Add unit tests for isValidNIF/isValidEmail/normalizeUrl validators
Add tests for rowToLead/rowToBuilding Zod parsing (good + corrupt rows)
Add tests for CSV escaping with quotes/newlines/PT chars
Add test that saveLead preserves notes (no cascade delete)
Add test for offline sync queue flush ordering
Set up Vitest config + coverage thresholds (80%)
Replace remaining empty catch {} bodies project-wide with logger.error
Add a top-level unhandledrejection/window.onerror handler reporting to logger
Add a 'Report a problem' action that copies the in-memory log ring buffer

phases.goal: Make the app handle thousands of buildings smoothly. Avoid full GeoJSON rebuilds, memoize selectors, debounce filters and persistence, lazy-load heavy modals, index/paginate the DB and table, throttle external APIs, and keep the map responsive at scale.

improvements.title: Drive map fill/outline color via feature-state, not full GeoJSON rebuild on lead change
Update only changed building feature-state when a single lead is upserted
Stop sending full rawTags/geometry into feature properties (strip before setData)
Memoize buildingsToGeoJSON keyed by building set, decouple from lead colors
Use MapLibre data-driven 'match' expression for colors via lead status feature-state
Debounce setData on rapid filter changes (animation frame batching)
Enable MapLibre source clustering or symbol thinning at low zoom
Hide building fill below a min zoom to cut paint cost when zoomed out
Only render buildings within current viewport bounds in the source
Use requestIdleCallback to persist map view instead of 500ms timer chain
Memoize useFilteredBuildings with shallow filter-key comparison
Pre-index leads-by-buildingId outside the filter loop (already map; ensure stable ref)
Use zustand selector with useShallow for multi-field subscriptions
Split filter values into a single filter slice object to reduce subscriptions
Memoize estimatePeakPower per building (cache by id+area)
Precompute kWp once and store on building instead of recomputing in 4 places
Memoize TableView sorted rows with useMemo keyed by sortKey/sortDesc/rows
Precompute display company/website maps to avoid per-render recompute in table
Virtualize TableView rows (react-virtual / windowing) for large lists
Paginate TableView (page size + controls) backed by DB LIMIT/OFFSET
Debounce SearchFilter live matchCount computation
Reuse useFilteredBuildings logic for SearchFilter count (single predicate source)
Debounce keyword filter input -> store (currently writes on every keypress)
Lazy-load LocationDetails modal with React.lazy/Suspense
Lazy-load StreetViewModal (Mapillary iframe) on demand
Lazy-load TableView and SearchFilter
Code-split @turf/turf to import only used functions (area, centroid, bbox, booleanPointInPolygon, buffer)
Tree-shake lucide-react icons via per-icon imports
Configure Vite manualChunks (maplibre, turf, vendor) for faster initial load
Lazy-load Excel export (xlsx) only when export clicked
Add DB index on leads(building_use)
Add DB index on leads(company) for company sort/search
Add DB index on buildings(area_sqm) for sorted reads
Add composite index buildings(centroid_lat, centroid_lon) for bbox queries
Register v8 indexes migration in lib.rs
Add getBuildingsInBBox(bbox) SQL using centroid indexes instead of getAllBuildings
Load buildings lazily by viewport at startup instead of all rows
Stream getAllBuildings in chunks to avoid blocking on huge datasets
Add count() queries for stats instead of loading all rows
Cache reverse-geocode + nearby-business results in DB (TTL) keyed by building
Cache PVGIS results by lat/lon/kWp to avoid re-querying on reopen
Cache Gemini company results per building (avoid repeat token spend)
Cache MapTiler style JSON in memory (fetched twice: load + toggle)
Cache Overture tile results in DB and serve before re-querying
Add HTTP-level caching headers / ETag respect via timedFetch where allowed
Throttle Overpass tile concurrency configurably and back off on 429
Global rate-limiter utility (token bucket) shared by Overpass/Nominatim
Batch nearby-business lookups when bulk-enriching many leads
Debounce MapSearch already 350ms — cancel superseded requests (AbortController scope)
Avoid recreating OSM_STYLE object each render (module constant already; verify no inline)
Use map.once('idle') gating before heavy setData to avoid jank during pan
Skip setData when geojson reference unchanged (already memo; add deep guard)
Move buildingsToGeoJSON off main thread via worker for large sets
Run dedup/classification in a web worker to keep UI responsive
Defer non-visible modal mounting (already conditional; ensure no hidden work)
Memoize SolarChart bar computation by monthlyKwh reference
Avoid re-sorting table on unrelated store updates (stable selectors)
Use React.memo on NavButton/TabBtn/FieldRow leaf components
Wrap event handlers passed to children in useCallback consistently
Avoid Object.fromEntries rebuild of leads map on every setLeads (incremental update)
Index leads by both id and buildingId to avoid getAllLeads refetch after batch
Avoid full getAllLeads() after every saveBuildingsBatch (merge in store)
Add prepared-statement reuse for hot DB writes
Use ANALYZE / periodic VACUUM scheduling for DB health
Lower map maxzoom raster overdraw; set tile cache size
Throttle moveend persistence to once per 1s under heavy panning
Avoid synchronous JSON.parse of geometry for all rows on startup (parse on demand)
Store geometry as compact array-of-coords, parse lazily for selected building
Add building search index (FTS5) for fast keyword filtering at scale
Route keyword filter through FTS when dataset large, JS filter otherwise
Add loading skeleton for table while paged data fetches
Cancel PVGIS/Gemini fetches when their modal closes
Coalesce duplicate concurrent reverse-geocode calls for same coord
Coalesce duplicate concurrent PVGIS calls for same input
Add in-flight request dedupe map keyed by URL in fetchUtils
Measure and log render timings in dev (React Profiler hook)
Add perf budget assertions in tests (filter 10k buildings < N ms)
Benchmark dedup at 10k/50k buildings; tune grid cell size
Use Map (not object) for store.leads to speed large upserts
Avoid array spread copy of all buildings on every addBuildings (use immer/structural)
Limit drawn-polygon vertex count and simplify draw layer updates
Throttle updateDrawLayer setData during fast point clicking
Defer MapTiler style swap until after first paint to speed startup
Preload font glyph pbf only for ranges actually used
Add IndexedDB fallback cache for browser-dev mode (no Tauri DB)
Compress stored rawTags (drop redundant keys) to shrink DB size
Add 'load more buildings in view' incremental Overpass on pan
Throttle automatic on-pan fetch with min movement + cooldown
Avoid rebuilding entire leads object in upsertLead (single key spread already; verify)
Batch DB note reads: getAllNotes once, avoid per-lead getNotesByLead refetch
Memoize REASONS list creation in DropLocationDialog (module-level already; confirm)
Use CSS containment on map overlay panels to limit reflow
Defer success/error toast unmount via CSS transition (no extra renders)
Avoid re-querying getAllLeads on draw-complete; merge new leads only
Add concurrency cap + progress for bulk PVGIS recompute (Phase 5 dep ready)
Profile and reduce MapLibre layer count (merge fill/outline expressions)
Add max feature count guard with downsampling notice over a threshold
Precompute and cache GeoJSON FeatureCollection in store, patch incrementally
Measure DuckDB Overture query latency and add timeout + progress
Add a lightweight performance dashboard (dev-only) showing counts/timings

phases.goal: Reach planno.io fidelity and accessibility. Standardize the design tokens, add ARIA roles/labels and keyboard navigation, focus management for modals, consistent loading/empty states, toasts, animations, and a coherent Portuguese-vs-English language pass.

improvements.title: Define dark-theme color tokens (bg-primary/secondary/border) in Tailwind config
Replace #0d0e1a/#13131f/#1a1a2e ad-hoc backgrounds with tokens
Standardize brand orange: pick one token (replace #f97316 vs brand-500 mix)
Replace arbitrary text-[10px]/[11px]/[13px] with Tailwind scale (text-xs/sm)
Unify border colors to a single dark-border token
Create shared Button component with variants (primary/secondary/ghost/danger)
Create shared Modal component (focus trap, ESC, backdrop click)
Refactor LocationDetails to use shared Modal
Refactor SearchFilter to use shared Modal
Refactor DropLocationDialog and StreetViewModal to shared Modal
Create shared Field/Input/Select components with consistent styling
Add role=tablist/tab/tabpanel to LocationSummary tabs
Add role=tablist/tab/tabpanel to LocationDetails tabs
Arrow-key navigation between tabs (left/right) with roving tabindex
aria-selected and aria-controls on tab buttons
Focus trap inside LocationDetails modal
Restore focus to trigger element when modal closes
ESC closes LocationDetails / SearchFilter / DropLocationDialog / StreetView
Backdrop click closes modals (consistent behavior)
aria-label on LocationSummary close button
aria-label on LocationDetails close + Duplicar buttons
aria-label on MapView toolbar buttons (Layers, Fullscreen)
aria-label on LocationSummary action row buttons (Get Metadata, OSM, recalc)
aria-label on EditableFieldRow edit/save controls
aria-pressed on SearchFilter ToggleBtn buttons
aria-current/aria-pressed on Sidebar NavButton active state
Add <title> + aria-label to SolarChart SVG ('Geração solar mensal')
Add aria-live=polite region for success/error toasts
Add aria-busy to loading buttons (Get Rooftops, Calculate Solar)
Fix placeholder contrast (#4a5160 fails WCAG AA) — lighten tokens
Audit all text/background pairs for WCAG AA contrast; adjust muted tokens
Add visible focus-ring styles to all interactive elements
Ensure all icon-only buttons have accessible names
Make map building selection keyboard-accessible (list + enter)
Add skip-to-content and landmark roles (nav/main)
Keyboard shortcut: G = Get Rooftops
Keyboard shortcut: D = toggle Draw mode
Keyboard shortcut: F = open Search Filter
Keyboard shortcut: T = toggle Table view
Keyboard shortcut: / = focus map search
Keyboard shortcut: Esc closes top-most panel (centralized)
Add a discoverable shortcuts help overlay (press ?)
Create centralized useKeyboardShortcuts hook (avoid scattered listeners)
Empty state on MapView when no buildings loaded (CTA to Get Rooftops)
Empty state for SearchFilter when 0 results (suggest reset)
Empty state for nearby suggestions when none found
Empty state for metadata tab when no raw OSM tags
Skeleton loaders for nearby-business / Gemini suggestions
Skeleton/loading state for solar calculation
Progress bar/percentage for tiled Get Rooftops fetch
Loading state for table data while paginating
Spinner for MapTiler/satellite style switch
Convert toasts to a queue (stack multiple, auto-dismiss timers managed)
Toast variants: success/error/info/warning with icons
Make toasts dismissible with a close button
Toast on successful Excel/CSV export with file name
Toast on lead saved / field updated (subtle, debounced)
Smooth enter/exit animation for LocationSummary panel
Fade/scale animation for modal open/close
Animate building selection (pulse outline) on map
Respect prefers-reduced-motion for all animations
Animate SolarChart bars on first render
Add hover tooltip on SolarChart bars (month + kWh)
Add y-axis/gridlines and value labels to SolarChart
Fix SolarChart MWh/kWh label mismatch (totalKwh shown as MWh)
Show draw-mode point count ('3 pontos · duplo-clique para terminar')
Indicate satellite vs streets active state on Layers toolbar button
Show selected-building summary header with company + area + kWp at a glance
Color-code pipeline stage chips consistently with map colors
Add pipeline + solar status quick-select chips in LocationSummary (avoid opening Details)
Make table columns sticky header + resizable + show all sortable
Add column for pipeline stage and drop reason in table
Row selection + selected-row highlight in table
Responsive sidebar collapse to icons on narrow widths
Resolve Settings button: open real settings panel (Phase 5) not toast stub
Resolve Analytics nav: route to dashboard (Phase 5) not table alias
Implement Layers panel content (currently toggles empty state)
Wire 'Select' nav to a real multi-select mode (selectionIds exist in store)
Language pass: standardize on Portuguese (Location Summary, Get Metadata, etc.)
Extract UI strings into an i18n dictionary (pt-PT) for consistency
Localize dates/numbers consistently with Intl (pt-PT) everywhere
Consistent currency formatting helper (€ pt-PT)
Tooltip component for truncated company/website cells
Confirm dialog component (reused for delete note, drop, bulk ops)
Empty website/phone fields show 'Adicionar' affordance not '—'
Add building photo / Mapillary thumbnail in LocationSummary header
Inline-edit for all Individual-tab fields with save/cancel affordances
Show validation feedback inline (NIF/email/url) with red border + message
Improve DropLocationDialog: search/filter long reasons list
Keyboard-select drop reason (arrow + enter)
Add app logo/branding polish and consistent header spacing
Add map scale control and coordinate readout
Add 'recenter to default' and 'fit to buildings' map buttons
Persist last view mode (map/table) across sessions
Show count badges on sidebar items (buildings loaded, leads)
Improve mobile/touch targets (min 40px) across toolbars
Add dark/light theme toggle backed by tokens (groundwork)
Add component snapshot/RTL tests for key UI states
Add axe-core accessibility test for modals and panels
Add Playwright E2E for select-building -> edit -> save -> table flow

phases.goal: Add professional prospecting capabilities: bulk operations, territories, advanced solar/ROI modelling, an analytics dashboard, settings, PDF/printable reports, import, undo/redo, scoring, and CRM-style pipeline tooling — building on the territories table and unused score/CAE/value columns already present.

improvements.title: Multi-select buildings on map (shift-click / box-select) populating selectionIds
Bulk action bar (set pipeline / solar status / flag) for selection
Bulk drop with reason for selected buildings
Bulk recalculate solar (PVGIS) for selection with progress
Bulk enrich companies (nearby + Gemini) for selection with rate limiting
Bulk assign owner/tags to selected leads
Bulk export selection (CSV/Excel/PDF)
Table-level multi-row select with checkboxes + bulk bar
Select-all-filtered action
Territories: draw + save a named territory polygon (uses territories table)
Territory CRUD repository (create/list/update/delete)
Render territory polygons as a map layer with labels
Filter buildings by territory (point-in-polygon)
Per-territory stats (count, total kWp, won rate)
Assign territory owner / rep field
Get Rooftops scoped to a territory (auto-tile its bbox)
Territory color coding on the map
Advanced solar: configurable tilt/azimuth/loss per building before PVGIS
East-west vs south racking option affecting usable area + yield
Self-consumption ratio input affecting savings calc
ROI module: CAPEX €/kWp, payback years, IRR, 25-yr NPV
ROI panel in LocationDetails with editable assumptions
CO2 avoided estimate (kg/yr) display
Electricity tariff config (€/kWh) replacing hardcoded 0.16
Store estimated_value_eur and probability (existing unused columns)
Weighted pipeline value = value x probability x stage
Lead scoring engine populating score + score_explanations (existing columns)
Score inputs: area, ciScore, solar status, has_existing_pv, distance to territory
Show score badge + explanation tooltip in table and summary
Sort/filter by score (index already exists)
Auto-rank: 'Top 50 prospects' quick view
CAE (Portuguese activity code) field capture + display (existing column)
Analytics dashboard: totals (buildings, leads, kWp, pipeline value)
Pipeline funnel chart (to_contact -> won)
Leads-by-solar-status donut chart
Leads-by-building-use bar chart
Drop-reason breakdown chart
kWp distribution histogram
Activity timeline (leads created/updated over time from audit)
Wire Analytics nav item to the real Dashboard view
Settings panel: API keys (MapTiler/Gemini/Mapillary) entry + persistence
Settings: default solar assumptions (tilt, loss, CAPEX, tariff)
Settings: default map center/zoom and coverage source
Settings: language and units preferences
Settings: data management (clear cache, vacuum DB, export/import all)
Persist settings in a settings table
Wire Settings nav to the real panel (remove 'em breve' stub)
PDF report: single-lead one-pager (company, address, area, kWp, kWh, savings, ROI, chart)
PDF: embed SolarChart and a static map snapshot
PDF: branded header/footer and contact block
Bulk PDF: portfolio report for a territory or selection
Print-friendly CSS view of LocationDetails
Export to Excel with multiple sheets (leads, notes, summary)
Export filtered/selected leads only (respect active filters)
Import leads from CSV (map columns, validate, dedupe by NIF/coords)
Import buildings from GeoJSON file
Import preset industrial-park lists (industrial_park column exists)
